description: Kickresume is an online service for creating resumes, cover letters, and personal career documents, with AI-assisted writing and editing features. It also publishes resume and cover-letter examples and related career content.
summary: Kickresume exposes a public MCP server at https://mcp-app.kickresume.com/mcp with SSE transport and no authentication; no public REST, GraphQL, or CLI developer surfaces were found on kickresume.com.
